projectNote: Final public-facing project name selected; historical working title retained only for context.

entries.action: Compared Synthesis tracks and visible public competition
entries.result: Identified the strongest strategic lane as Lido plus delegations plus receipts / ERC-8004 accountability

entries.action: Evaluated multiple concepts and selected the treasury-and-allowance direction
entries.result: Chose the principal-protected yield treasury architecture that became Agent Allowance Protocol

entries.action: Set up the Solidity / Foundry repo and authored contracts, tests, scripts, and docs
entries.result: Working protocol with treasury, authorizer, receipt registry, and budget / sub-budget logic

entries.action: Installed and used Foundry, Bun, and OpenClaw validation tooling on the VPS
entries.result: 31/31 tests passing at the recorded repo snapshot and repeatable readiness tooling in place

entries.action: Deployed the contract set to Base Sepolia and executed early live spend proofs
entries.result: Initial public artifacts recorded in the Sepolia deployment notes

entries.action: Upgraded the protocol to include stronger budget semantics and explicit rule-linked receipt provenance
entries.result: Receipts now capture the exact matched authorization rule ID and the treasury design reflects the stronger allowance-tree model

entries.action: Completed Synthesis registration and triggered the ERC-8004 identity path
Implemented real MetaMask smart-account derivation, constrained delegation artifact generation, bundler-aware deployment flow, and live redemption tooling
Executed the live Base mainnet treasury + MetaMask redemption flow using real Base mainnet wstETH
Used an OpenClaw heartbeat / ongoing automation loop to keep integrating docs, readiness checks, and submission packaging
entries.result: The repo stayed continuously updated, but the loop occasionally got stuck or circled on hard blockers and required human intervention

entries.action: Updated the public-safe manifest/log defaults and aligned the final repo story with the live Base mainnet proof
Documented the real human-agent workflow in the submission story
entries.result: The repo now explicitly states that the agent helped choose the direction, implemented large parts of the project, operated in a heartbeat loop, got stuck on some issues, and needed human intervention for final unblocking and shipping
